description: Biosignal processing — ECG QRS detection, HRV, PPG SpO2, EDA, arrhythmia classification

exp020_pan_tompkins_qrs.paper: Pan J, Tompkins WJ (1985) A real-time QRS detection algorithm
exp020_pan_tompkins_qrs.note: Synthetic ECG at 360 Hz (MIT-BIH sampling rate), not actual PhysioNet waveforms

standards: Task Force of ESC/NASPE (1996) HRV standards. Eur Heart J 17:354-381

exp082_arrhythmia_classification.note: Uses Gaussian template morphology, not actual PhysioNet waveforms
